merchantCTA.title: Want to be a provider?
merchantCTA.subtitle: Join over 500 providers across Mexico
benefits: Flexible schedule, you decide when to work

questions.a: When you start a transaction, your USDC is locked in a smart contract. The provider only receives the USDC after you confirm you received your cash. If something goes wrong, you get a full refund.
Fees vary between providers, typically 1-3%. MicoPay charges a small 0.5% platform fee.

questions.q: Do I need a bank account?
questions.a: No. MicoPay is designed for people without bank access. You only need a crypto wallet (the app helps you create one).
Yes. The escrow guarantees your money is protected. Providers have verified on-chain reputation and are regulated.
USDC is a stablecoin tied to the dollar. 1 USDC = 1 USD. It's the currency we use for transactions.

questions.q: Can I use this for remittances?
questions.a: Yes! Send USDC from anywhere in the world and your family can withdraw cash in Mexico without high Western Union fees.

footer.description: Your money, near you. Convert USDC to Mexican pesos securely.
